prompts.title: CRM Platform
prompts.prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.

prompts.title: E-Commerce Store
prompts.prompt: Create an online store with product listings, shopping cart, checkout with Stripe, admin panel for inventory management, customer reviews, and order tracking.

prompts.title: LMS
prompts.prompt: Build a learning management system with courses, quizzes, student progress tracking, instructor dashboard, certificate generation, and discussion forums.

prompts.title: Simple Blog
prompts.prompt: Build a simple blog with public posts and an admin panel to create, edit, and delete posts. Admins have a login.

prompts.title: To-Do App
prompts.prompt: Build a to-do list app where users can register, login, and manage their personal tasks. Users cannot see other users' tasks.

prompts.title: Feedback Form
prompts.prompt: Build a simple public feedback form that submits to a database. Admins can log in to view a dashboard of all feedback.

prompts.title: Project Manager
prompts.prompt: Build a project management tool with teams, tasks, kanban boards, file uploads, notifications, and time tracking. Managers can assign tasks and view reports.

prompts.title: Healthcare Portal
prompts.prompt: Build a patient portal with appointment booking, medical records, prescriptions, doctor profiles, messaging, and billing. Doctors and patients have different views.

prompts.title: Social Platform
prompts.prompt: Create a social media platform with user profiles, posts, comments, likes, followers, messaging, and content moderation for admins.

prompts.title: HR System
prompts.prompt: Build an HR management system with employee profiles, leave management, payroll, performance reviews, and recruitment pipeline. HR admins manage everything.

prompts.title: Restaurant POS
prompts.prompt: Create a restaurant point-of-sale system with menu management, order taking, kitchen display, payments, and daily sales reports. Waiters and managers have different access.

prompts.title: Real Estate
prompts.prompt: Build a real estate listing platform with property listings, search filters, virtual tour scheduling, agent profiles, and inquiry management.

prompts.title: Event Platform
prompts.prompt: Create an event management platform with event creation, ticketing, attendee management, speaker profiles, schedule builder, and check-in system.

prompts.title: Vague Prompt
prompts.prompt: Make me an app for managing stuff

prompts.title: Conflicting Requirements
prompts.prompt: Build a free app with premium features. All users should have admin access but restrict sensitive data to admins only.

prompts.title: Incomplete Spec
prompts.prompt: I need a dashboard

prompts.title: Role Ambiguity
prompts.prompt: Build a school system where teachers and students can grade assignments and manage classes.

prompts.title: Monetization Ambiguity
prompts.prompt: Build a SaaS tool with a free tier and enterprise features but make everything available to everyone.

prompts.title: Missing Auth
prompts.prompt: Build a blog platform with posts, comments, and admin panel.

prompts.title: Single Word
prompts.prompt: CRM

prompts.title: Contradictory Roles
prompts.prompt: Build an app where guests can delete user accounts and admins can only read content.

prompts.title: Over-specified
prompts.prompt: Build an app with exactly 47 pages, 200 API endpoints, 15 database tables, and support for 8 user roles with 150 different permissions. Include machine learning, blockchain, and quantum computing integration.

prompts.title: Empty-ish
prompts.prompt: Build something cool with some features and maybe users
